programmes.show_description: Fusion Confusion: US cooking competition. The chefs go head-to-head in a football-themed cuisine challenge and try not to fall flat for legendary fusion chef and judge Tony Messina.
Around the Corner: Comedy-drama series. Arthur's luck seems to be going to the dogs when he buys a dodgy greyhound and gets conned over some bent videos.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Shopping from home.
A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1980s - from football to wrestling and double decker bus racing to boxing - that includes many iconic moments.
AAPI: Classic US action drama series. Famous French detective Jean-Claude Fornier is murdered while he is presenting Thomas with a prestigious private investigator award.
Kojak's Days - Part Two: The body discovered in the stolen Rolls Royce is identified as Theo tries to track down the woman who killed her husband in time.
Return of the Invincible Man: Comedy-drama series. Arthur hires failed safecracker Scotch Harry for a job - and finds himself with a bandaged fugitive on his hands.
Magazine show to complement coverage of ITV horse racing - it is presented on-site from the main course each Saturday with additional weekday programmes during the big festivals.
When Harry Met Janice: Classic drama. Harry gets more than he bargained for when he meets an attractive woman with lingerie on her mind.
Chalk and Cheese: When a wealthy couple are robbed of their possessions while driving, Carter gets to meet up with an old friend - but not in the circumstances he would have wished.
Edges, Wedges, and Wheels: A fresh group of bots look to leave their mark with a signature victory, while Blip takes on Overhaul in an exciting Main Event.
Death and Taxes: Higgins jets off to Maui and leaves Thomas with income tax returns to work on, but a psycho killer disturbs the PI's concentration.
Monkey on a String: Classic US detective drama. A down-on-his-luck cop with a gambling problem ends up owing money to a gangster who offers to clear the debt if he kills Crocker.
Stamp Duty: Classic drama. There is a puzzle for Ken and Harry to solve when a simple case of tracking down a witness turns into a tale of double-crossing and missing money.
Faces: Police series. When a gang hijack an armoured security truck, Regan, Carter and the Flying Squad set up an ambush to catch the crooks. But who's the informer?
Arthur Is Dead, Long Live Arthur: Comedy-drama series. Arthur considers taking his own life when faced with a massive tax demand.
Furphy Man: The first episode of the Australian American Pickers spin-off. Salvage experts Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald visit a collector who specialises in Furphy water carts.
Trapped on Thin Ice: Nail-biting documentary series. Jack Jessee traverses steep mountain passes during an urgent fuel delivery and fears that he may get stranded on a frozen river.
Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Comedy legend Lee Mack is back to find out with another episode of the game show where 100 contestants battle to win 100,000 pounds.
Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page.
Collision in Korea: Wrestling documentary series. Professional wrestlers deployed to North Korea face a terrifying ordeal in one of the most bizarre acts of political theatre ever.
Give Us This Day Arthur Daley's Bread: Comedy-drama series. Arthur digs a very large hole for himself when he recruits some ex-cons as cheap labour for a gardening enterprise.
Round One to the Hot Crazy Chick: The first part of a two-part episode of the American sitcom about a well-off bachelor. Charlie falls for a seemingly crazy woman called Frankie.
That Was Saliva, Alan: The concluding part of a two-part episode of the American sitcom about a bachelor. Frankie tells Charlie and Alan why she and her daughter are on the run.

Disappearing Trick: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. A multi-millionaire's son approaches the Protectors for help proving that he can vanish without a trace.
Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including West Ham United vs Southampton, Manchester United vs Ipswich Town, and Portsmouth vs Oxford United.
Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season including Chelsea vs Manchester United, Blackburn Rovers vs Huddersfield Town, and Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa.
Big Spender: Action-packed police series. Regan and Carter are on a routine surveillance job watching a notorious gang of hijackers when they uncover a lucrative car-parking fraud.
Oli Bell and the team are at Aintree ahead of the world's most famous horse race, the Grand National.
Brian Moore introduces highlights from December 1971 as table-topping Manchester United, featuring George Best, Denis Law and Bobby Charlton, take on Nottingham Forest.
The Duchess and the Devil: Drama series about CS Forester's seafaring hero. Hornblower leads a daring raid on a French sloop and is rewarded by being allowed to set sail for England.
Wartime action film starring Henry Fonda and Robert Shaw, 1965. A WWII US intelligence officer tries to find a weak spot in a German offensive to retake the Ardennes and Antwerp.

From Nijinsky to Tiger Roll, Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era - enjoy Best Mate's third Gold Cup and Shergar racing to Derby glory.

programmes.show_name: Live NHL: Boston v Tampa Bay
programmes.show_description: Action from the NHL as the Boston Bruins face the Tampa Bay Lightning at TD Garden in Boston, with both teams aiming for a potential run in the playoffs.
Mongolian Mauler: Extreme fisherman Jeremy Wade takes a trip to Mongolia to investigate a giant fish that is said to be one of the world's strongest fighters on a line.
Last Orders: Richard Henwood takes a look back at The Indoor League, a TV show featuring 1970s pub games and presented by Yorkshire cricketing great Fred Trueman.
A selection of nine-dart finishes from ITV Sport's darts coverage - every darts player strives to produce one, and this prowess is even more impressive in front of the TV cameras.
A short sports film about the legendary racehorse.
Action from the day's fixtures, including Coventry v Sheffield Wednesday, Norwich v Ipswich, Leicester v Swansea and Sheffield United v Hull in the Championship.
